sections.paragraph:
Original: רצן רצון

Transliteration: râtsôn râtsôn

Phonetic: raw-tsone'

BDB Definition:

  1. pleasure, delight, favour, goodwill, acceptance, will
    1. goodwill, favour
    2. acceptance
    3. will, desire, pleasure, self-will

Origin: from H7521

TWOT entry: 2207a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
